{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahze paschâ Nam-
mâ/ ( ta fu ) Kweefchus xemda-
mi/ un duhre winnu Kungi / un
Rekobs un Baëmus winna Brab-
liis aisbehdse.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee nahze Nammâ win-
xam us sawu Gultu gulloht/ un
fitte to/ un nokawe to/ un tee no-
zirte winnam to Galwu. Un neh-
me to paschu / un nogahje us ta
Klaijuma Zeltu winnu Nakti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee neſſe Jsboſeta Gal-
wu pee Dahwida us Eebronn.
Un tazzija us to Kehnizu : Reds/
fche irr Jsboſeta Saula Dehla
tawa Eenaidneeka Galwa / kas
tawu Dsihwibu mekle. Ta irr
tas KUNGS mannu Kungu to
Kehnizu fhodeen atreebis no
Saula un winna Dsimunma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Dahwids atbildeja
Rekobam un winna Brahtam
Baënau/ Rimoxa ta Berotite-
ra Dehleem/ un fazzija us teem:
Tik teefcham fa tas KUNGS
Dsihwo / kas mannu Dwehsfeli
atpestijs irr no wiffahm Beh-
dahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es grahbu to / kas man
s- to Wehsti neſſe/fazzidams : Ran-
gi/ Sauls irr nomirris/ un fschit-
tahs man labbas Wehstis nest/
un nokawu to Ziflagâ / jepschu
tas fschkittahs / ka man bij win-
nam Wehstneschu Algu dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zeek wairak/ kad besdee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wigi Wihri weenu taifnu Wih-
sawâ Namunâ us sawu Gult
nokawfschi: Un nu / ne bij ma-
wixxa Affini no juhfahm Ro-
kahm mefleht / un juhs no tah-
Semmes nomaittaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids pawehlej
fatveem Puischeem/ un tee nok-
we tohs / un nozirte winxee-
Rohkas un Rahjas / un uskah-
tohs pee Eebrona Dthki : Bo
Jsboſeta Galwu nehme tee / u-
aprakke to eeksch Abnera Kapp
Eebronâ.
"
    }
